task_description: Major UI overhaul of the portfolio website: simplify navbar, fix dark theme, redesign projects section with mobile 2-col grid and detail pages, make About tabs horizontal/swipeable with soft/hard skills tab, remove Skills section entirely, and redesign Contact section to be ultra-interactive with bug fixes.

verification.summary: TypeScript compilation and Vite build pass cleanly. No test suite exists in this project (portfolio website). All 6 features implemented successfully.
